_doc: Override MCP tool descriptions with user-intent phrasing so the model
picks them more accurately. Key format: '<server name>:<tool name>'.
If a key is present, its value replaces the upstream description.
Why this matters: MCP servers ship dev-facing descriptions ('Execute
SQL query against configured database') which are terse and focused
on HOW. The model picks tools based on 'when should I use this'.
Rewriting descriptions in user-intent form (what problem does this
solve?) typically improves tool-selection accuracy by 20-30 points
and shortens the prompt budget at the same time.
Examples below are starter suggestions — rewrite them for YOUR mix.
Anything not in this file passes through unchanged.

overrides.smartnote:search_knowledge: When the user asks about something they've discussed or saved before — notes, memories, past decisions, their preferences. Hybrid retrieval over their SmartNote knowledge base.
overrides.smartnote:ingest_notes: When the user wants to remember something new, save a finding, or add a note to their knowledge base.
overrides.smartnote:list_tags: When the user asks 'what topics do I have notes on' or wants to see the taxonomy of their knowledge.
overrides.smartnote:get_dashboard: When the user asks 'what's new', 'what's been happening', or wants an overview of recent knowledge activity.
overrides.smartnote:read_source: When the user references a specific note / document / source by name and wants to see its full content.
overrides.sql-gateway:execute_sql: When the user asks to query, count, aggregate, join, or inspect rows in a database. Use ONLY when the user explicitly mentions a database, a table name, or asks for numbers/reports that clearly live in SQL.
overrides.sql-gateway:inspect_table: When the user wants to know what columns a table has, or the schema of a database.
overrides.feishu:im_v1_message_list: When the user asks about recent messages / conversations in Feishu (飞书).
overrides.feishu:wiki_v1_node_search: When the user asks to find a specific Feishu wiki page or document by topic.
overrides.feishu:docx_v1_document_rawContent: When the user wants the full text of a specific Feishu doc they've identified by URL or title.
